Canonical_pattern: Domain re-skin of a coding-agent OS
Definition: Forking an entire spec-driven dev toolchain and rebinding its slots (tests→metrics, code→assets, constitution→domain principles) to a wholly different function while keeping the CLI/command/template machinery intact — the OS is the fork-and-rebind recipe, not the content.
Exemplars: agentii-ai/growth-hacking-kit: growthkit clones Spec-Kit's structure; one .growthkit/ source fans out to 34 agent/script variants; ships .specify/+.growthkit/+.blogkit/ proving the template is the reusable unit
Repos: agentii-ai/growth-hacking-kit, coreyhaines31/marketingskills, zubair-trabzada/ai-marketing-claude
